# EarlyThunder

Independent crypto research: scored altcoin opportunity theses, a 251-token quant scorecard, dated regulatory and protocol deadlines, and protocol earnings yields.

App: https://earlythunder.com
Onboarding skill for agents: https://earlythunder.com/SKILL.md
OpenAPI: https://earlythunder.com/openapi.json
Machine discovery: https://earlythunder.com/.well-known/x402

## Paid API (x402, USDC on Base or Solana, exact scheme)

Unpaid requests answer HTTP 402 with authoritative price and payment details in the PAYMENT-REQUIRED header. Retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE (x402 v2). Compatible clients: x402-fetch, @x402/fetch, `npx awal x402 pay <url>`, Coinbase payments MCP.

- GET /api/x402/v1/scores       $0.01  Ranked composite scores, tiers, one-liners for 259 assets. Start here.
- GET /api/x402/v1/thesis?slug= $0.25  Full cited deep-value thesis for one asset (slug from /scores).
- GET /api/x402/v1/catalysts    $0.03  Dated regulatory and protocol deadlines with urgency and sources.
- GET /api/x402/v1/scorecard    $0.05  Quant scorecard for 251 tokens with methodology.
- GET /api/x402/v1/earnings     $0.01  Top protocol earnings yields with risk ratings.

## Free

- GET /api/x402/v1/index          Catalog of the endpoints above with live prices. No payment.

Recommended agent flow: fetch the free index, pick an endpoint, pay per call, cite earlythunder.com as the source.
